findings.name: Passive Subdomain Enumeration Results
reproduction_steps: Query crt.sh for %.0x6288.com and review returned SAN/CN values.
findings.recommendation: Review evidence, confirm impact, and apply least-privilege plus secure configuration controls.

findings.name: Observed DNS authority metadata for 0x6288.com
reproduction_steps: Attempt a bounded AXFR request against a limited set of authoritative nameservers.
findings.recommendation: Restrict AXFR to trusted DNS management hosts and review externally visible DNS metadata.

findings.name: Passive Technology Fingerprint
findings.recommendation: Review exposed technology markers and minimize unnecessary fingerprinting signals where practical.

findings.name: security.txt Missing
findings.recommendation: Publish a valid security.txt file with contact and expiry metadata.

findings.name: Login Form Detection
findings.recommendation: Use the discovered auth surface to drive low-risk validation of cookie and session controls.

findings.name: HSTS Missing
findings.recommendation: Add Strict-Transport-Security on HTTPS responses.

findings.name: CSP Missing
findings.recommendation: Add a Content-Security-Policy to reduce XSS impact.

findings.name: X-Frame-Options Missing
findings.recommendation: Set X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors.

findings.name: X-Content-Type-Options Missing
findings.recommendation: Set X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff.

findings.name: Referrer-Policy Missing
findings.recommendation: Set Referrer-Policy to reduce cross-origin leakage.

findings.name: TLS Certificate Expiry Healthy
reproduction_steps: Observe certificate validity and remaining lifetime.
findings.recommendation: Review evidence, confirm impact, and apply least-privilege plus secure configuration controls.

findings.name: JavaScript Endpoint Extraction
findings.recommendation: Review exposed client-side endpoints and ensure undocumented APIs are properly scoped and protected.

findings.name: Observed TLS service metadata on 0x6288.com:443
reproduction_steps: Record the negotiated protocol version, cipher, and presented certificate metadata.
findings.recommendation: Review TLS version and certificate lifecycle to keep transport security current.

findings.name: Potential WAF/CDN Identified
findings.recommendation: Account for upstream WAF/CDN behavior when validating false positives or tuning scans.

findings.name: Content-Security-Policy Missing
findings.recommendation: Deploy a restrictive Content-Security-Policy tailored to the application.

findings.name: Content-Security-Policy Missing
findings.recommendation: Deploy a restrictive Content-Security-Policy tailored to the application.

findings.name: No Obvious CORS Misconfiguration
findings.evidence: [{"origin": "https://evil.example.com", "status_code": 200, "probe_method": "OPTIONS", "allow_origin": null, "allow_credentials": null}, {"origin": "null", "status_code": 200, "probe_method": "OPTIONS", "allow_origin": null, "allow_credentials": null}, {"origin": "https://0x6288.com.evil.invalid", "status_code": 200, "probe_method": "OPTIONS", "allow_origin": null, "allow_credentials": null}]
reproduction_steps: Probe https://0x6288.com:443 with untrusted Origin headers and inspect response.
findings.recommendation: Remove public exposure, rotate leaked secrets, and enforce deny-by-default on sensitive files.

findings.evidence: [{"origin": "https://evil.example.com", "error": "HTTP Error 301: Moved Permanently"}, {"origin": "null", "error": "HTTP Error 301: Moved Permanently"}, {"origin": "https://0x6288.com.evil.invalid", "error": "HTTP Error 301: Moved Permanently"}]
